peekinside.detail_hint: Hold the Detail View key to view full contents
config.peekinside.title: Container Preview
config.peekinside.controls_hint: Hold %s while hovering to peek. Hold %s to lock the preview in place and move your mouse into it for scrolling and searching. Hold %s to force the full grid even when item compression is enabled.
config.peekinside.preview_key.desc: The key held down while hovering to reveal the container contents. If 'Always Show' is enabled, this key isn't needed for basic viewing but still works.
config.peekinside.preview_key.capture: Press a key or mouse button to bind Preview.
config.peekinside.lock_key.desc: Hold this key to keep the preview on screen. Once locked, you can move your mouse into the box to see nested boxes, scroll through large inventories, or type to filter items.
config.peekinside.lock_key.capture: Press a key or mouse button to bind Lock.
config.peekinside.detail_key.desc: Used to temporarily force the preview to show every single item slot exactly as it is in the container, bypassing item compression.
config.peekinside.detail_key.capture: Press a key or mouse button to bind Detail View.
config.peekinside.preview_enabled.desc: The master switch for the mod. If turned off, no previews will ever be shown, and the mod will remain dormant.
config.peekinside.locking_enabled.desc: Allows you to freeze a preview on your screen using the Lock Key. Essential for seeing items inside Shulker Boxes that are themselves inside a Chest or for filtering large inventories.
config.peekinside.compression_enabled.de: Summarizes repeated stacks into a compact preview. Turn this off to keep the full slot grid visible at all times.
config.peekinside.detail_preview_enabled: When enabled, holding the Detail View key shows the exact slot grid instead of the compressed summary.
config.peekinside.nested_previews_enable: Allows you to see the contents of containers that are stored inside other containers. Simply lock the first preview, then hover over the container item inside it.
config.peekinside.show_market_info.desc: Displays extra metadata for items from shop or economy mods, such as the seller's name, the listed price, and the total quantity available.
config.peekinside.show_statistics_bar.de: Adds a small bar at the top of the preview showing fill percentage, total slots used, and a sum of every single item inside.
config.peekinside.show_search_filter.des: When you have a preview locked and start typing, this will display your search query at the bottom and dim items that don't match your search text.
config.peekinside.show_slot_counts.desc: Shows the item count number in the bottom-right corner of every slot in the grid, just like in a real inventory.
config.peekinside.compact_number_formatt: Shortens large stack numbers into a cleaner format (e.g., 1,400 becomes 1.4k). Can be disabled to always show the full, exact number.
config.peekinside.hold_to_preview.desc: If ON, you must hold the Preview Key to show previews. If OFF, previews appear on hover without holding a key.
If enabled, the preview will still appear for containers with no items. This is great for quickly confirming that a Shulker Box is indeed empty before picking it up.
config.peekinside.show_empty_label.desc: Places a clear and colorful 'Empty!' notification inside the preview when the container has absolutely no items in it.
config.peekinside.hide_vanilla_lines.des: Removes the basic 5-line item list that Minecraft normally shows for Shulker Boxes. This makes the tooltip much cleaner and less cluttered when using this mod.
config.peekinside.tint_background.desc: Subtly colors the background of the preview based on the color of the container item. For example, a Pink Shulker Box will result in a pink-tinted preview panel.
config.peekinside.slot_size.desc: The pixel size of each square in the item grid. Default is 18. Higher values make items larger and easier to see, but make the overall box bigger.
config.peekinside.padding.desc: The amount of empty space between the items and the outer edge of the preview box.
config.peekinside.ui_scale.desc: Scales the entire preview UI up or down. Useful for players with very high or very low resolution monitors.
config.peekinside.max_visible_rows.desc: The limit for how tall the preview can get (in rows). If a container is taller than this (like a Double Chest), it will become scrollable.
config.peekinside.max_nested_depth.desc: Controls how many layers deep you can 'peek' into nested containers. Increasing this too much can lead to recursion issues or screen clutter.
peekinside.key_capture_cancel: Press any key or mouse button to bind it. Backspace clears the binding, Esc cancels.
config.peekinside.category.general.desc: Manage the core behavior of the mod, including master toggles and summary compression.
config.peekinside.category.controls.desc: Configure the keys used to interact with the previews.
config.peekinside.category.layout.desc: Customize the visual appearance and scaling of the preview grid.
config.peekinside.category.advanced.desc: Fine-tune technical aspects like peeking depth and item blacklists.
